title: My Electric Girl (V5 Remix)
caption: Fun funk song adapted from 1920s public domain work
about: This was one of the first public domain works I re-interpreted using AI.
lyrics:
There’s this girl — her eyes sparkle fire
Take her hand, and love jumps the wire
Every time she smiles, current climbs higher
Dance by her side — get electrified!
This electric girl got those winning ways
One small glance sets the night ablaze
With a little smile, she steals hearts away
One look, and man, you’ve gotta say—

I don’t care what becomes of me
Shock-full of electricity
When I meet your eye
I see the bright sparks fly
That flash! dash! Electric girl o’ mine

She don’t talk much — she don’t need to try
One little wink then you’re flyin’ high
She lights up a room just by steppin’ in
If your heart gives out, she’ll start it again.
A kiss from her, world feels just right
Got that certain glow — a total spotlight.
She moves like rhythm, clean and tight
I''d chase her spark all through the night!

I don’t care what becomes of me
Shock-full of electricity
When I meet your eye
I see the bright sparks fly
That flash! dash! Electric girl o’ mine

Caught in her current — I can’t let go
She’s lightning wrapped in a lover’s glow
She powers each heart beat
Makes any static become so sweet.

I don’t care what becomes of me
Shock-full of electricity
When I meet your eye
I see the bright sparks fly
That flash! dash! Electric girl o’ mine

I don’t care what becomes of me
Shock-full of electricity

I don’t care what becomes of me
Shock-full of electricity
